'''√th-n-k''' ('''kathanak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dear|dear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dear|dear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-n-k
|-
! Lemma
| kathanak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thithanak || jithanak || shithanak || kithanak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuthanak || jujuthanak || shushuthanak || kukuthanak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuthanak || juthanak || shuthanak || kuthanak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuthanak || juthanak || shuthanak || kuthanak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thethanak || jethanak || shethanak || kethanak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothothanak || jojothanak || shoshothanak || kokothanak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thothanak || jothanak || shothanak || kothanak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thothanak || jothanak || shothanak || kothanak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thanak || thanak || thanak || thanak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thanak || thanak || thanak || thanak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thanak || thanak || thanak || thanak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thanak || thanak || thanak || thanak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæthanak || jæthanak || shæthanak || kæthanak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathathanak || jajathanak || shashathanak || kakathanak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thathanak || jathanak || shathanak || kathanak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thathanak || jathanak || shathanak || kathanak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shathanak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshathanak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishathanak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shathanaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshathanaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishathanaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shathanakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshathanaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishathanakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shathanakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshathanaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishathanakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shathanakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshathanaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishathanakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shathanaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshathanaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishathanaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shathanakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshathanaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishathanakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shathanakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshathanaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishathanakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shathanakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshathanaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishathanakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shathanaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshathanaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishathanaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shathanaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathanaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathanaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shathanaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshathanaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathanaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shathanakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshathanaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishathanakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shathanakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathanaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathanakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shathanakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshathanaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathanakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shathanakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshathanaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishathanakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shathanakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshathanaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishathanakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shathanakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshathanaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathanakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shathanakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshathanaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishathanakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shathanakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshathanaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishathanakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shathanakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathanaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathanakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
